workflow: built-in image_gen; side_inward uses only same-role generated front as identity reference

front.prompt: Create an original dignified deep-ocean fungal ambassador with a broad asymmetrical manta-like mushroom cap, layered mist gills, four folded frond arms, three pearl eyes, a cyan throat organ, compact cephalopod lower body, and a low crescent command-seat plinth. Premium stylized 3D board-game render, exact straight-on front view, full subject and base, flat #ff00ff chroma background, no text, watermark, weapon, scenery, existing character, or third-party IP.

side_inward.prompt: Preserve the exact fungal ambassador identity and crescent seat from the generated front, but render a genuine strong three-quarter left-facing inward view with foreshortening and overlap. Full subject and base, flat #ff00ff chroma background, no mirror-only edit, text, watermark, weapon, scenery, new accessory, or existing IP.

front.prompt: Create an original floating ion-plasma executive in a tall navy-black faceted ceramic shell, with a horizontal blue visor, rigid archive collar, folded registrar arms, abstract data seals, three close ion capacitors, and an anti-gravity pedestal. Premium stylized 3D board-game render, exact straight-on front view, full subject and base, flat #00ff00 chroma background, no human face, text, watermark, weapon, scenery, generic soldier, existing character, or third-party IP.

side_inward.prompt: Preserve the exact ion-plasma executive, shell, collar, registrar arms, data seals, three capacitors, palette, and pedestal from the generated front, but render a genuine strong three-quarter left-facing inward view. Full subject and base, flat #00ff00 chroma background, no mirror-only edit, text, watermark, weapon, scenery, new parts, or existing IP.

front.prompt: Create one original symbiotic two-headed stablemaster organism in a broad horseshoe command saddle: a cyan crescent-crested moon-owl/reptile head and an orange antler-finned salamander/deer head share a quilted four-armed body with two luminous heart cores, a grooming ring, and a feed vessel. Premium stylized 3D board-game render, exact front view, full paired organism and saddle, flat #00ff00 chroma background, no separate people, human, robot, text, watermark, weapon, scenery, existing character, or third-party IP.

side_inward.prompt: Preserve the exact paired stablemaster identity, both heads, shared four-armed body, twin heart cores, tools, harness, palette, and horseshoe saddle from the generated front, but render a genuine strong three-quarter left-facing inward view with the cyan head nearer and orange head partially behind. Full subject and base, flat #00ff00 chroma background, no mirror-only edit, split characters, text, watermark, weapon, new costume, or existing IP.

front.prompt: Create an original broad squat six-limbed arthropod council speaker in a hexagonal basalt cradle: dark honeycomb shield body, low triangular head with five cyan compound eyes, six short honey-gold voting arms with distinct geometric fingertips, and six attached glowing hex staff nodes. Premium stylized 3D board-game render, exact front view, full speaker and cradle, flat #ff00ff chroma background, no humanoid, generic mech, bee mascot, text, watermark, wings, stinger, weapon, scenery, existing character, or third-party IP.

side_inward.prompt: Preserve the exact six-limbed arthropod council speaker, basalt honeycomb shell, five cyan eyes, six voting arms and fingertips, six staff nodes, amber inlays, palette, and hex cradle from the generated front, but render a genuine strong three-quarter left-facing inward view with all six arms readable.
